positive: A stylized, minimalistic illustration of a soaring hummingbird hovering among abstract tropical foliage and geometric floral patterns. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern botanicals, using a vibrant, high-contrast color palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, deep indigo, and pops of metallic gold. The composition must be centered, featuring clear, bold silhouettes suitable for screen printing on apparel. Include subtle, repeating patterns in the background that create depth without clutter. Clean lines, flat dimensionality, highly stylized, elegant, symmetrical, highly detailed, 8k, pop art print.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, cartoon, graffiti, poorly drawn hands, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, realistic photo, bokeh, sepia, grayscales
